name: insane-search
description: Codex-first blocked-web access skill with public endpoint routing, Jina fallback, and browser escalation.

interface.shortDescription: Codex search escalation for blocked pages, public endpoints, and browser fallback
interface.longDescription: Use Insane Search to help Codex fetch stubborn public content by preferring known public endpoints, Jina Reader, metadata extraction, and browser fallback in a consistent 4-phase search chain.
defaultPrompt: Summarize this blocked article with the cheapest method first
Read a public profile or post from a difficult platform
Use a public endpoint before scraping a JS-heavy page
